auction_lots.title: Bildnis Elisabeth Lederer (Portrait of Elisabeth Lederer)
auction_lots.description: One of Klimt's finest portraits, depicting the heiress Elisabeth Lederer. The painting stands 6 feet tall and showcases the artist's intricate decorative style.

auction_lots.title: Blumenwiese (Blooming Meadow)
auction_lots.description: A vibrant landscape painted during Klimt's summer retreat to Lake Attersee, exemplifying his mosaic-like approach to nature.

auction_lots.title: Romans parisiens (Piles de romans parisiens)
auction_lots.description: An intimate still-life depicting piles of French novels, believed to be painted in Theo van Gogh's apartment.

auction_lots.title: No. 31 (Yellow Stripe)
auction_lots.description: A classic example of Rothko's luminous color-field paintings, featuring stacked red, pink, peach, and yellow rectangles.

auction_lots.title: El sueño (La cama)
auction_lots.description: A surrealist self-portrait of Kahlo lying in a bed suspended in the sky, with a skeleton wired with dynamite hovering above.

auction_lots.title: Trois personnages
auction_lots.description: With its bold interplay of pen and brush and the curiously disparate cast of characters, the present work highlights Picasso’s interest in both the formal techniques and narrative aspects of his Old Master forebears.

auction_lots.title: Composition with Large Red Plane, Bluish Gray, Yellow, Black and Blue
auction_lots.description: A canonical example of Mondrian's mature De Stijl period, dominated by a large red square within a geometric grid.

auction_lots.title: Untitled
auction_lots.description: sheet metal, brass, wire and paint5 by 4 ½ by 1 ½ in.  12.7 by 11.4 by 3.8 cm.

auction_lots.title: Bouquet
auction_lots.description: A vibrant floral bouquet by Chagall, which became the highest-priced work sold in Korea in 2025.

auction_lots.title: Bomb Love
auction_lots.description: A rare screenprint from an edition of 600, depicting a young girl hugging a bomb. Iconic street art by the anonymous artist Banksy.
